companyterms.subtitleCompany: Everything you need to know about our company and cooperation terms
companyterms.aboutWeAreCompany: We are a B2B supplier of industrial ventilation, valves and heat exchangers for factories, production plants, bakeries, paint shops and industrial facilities.
companyterms.aboutOurExpertise: Our expertise includes air cooling, dust extraction, vapor exhaust systems and custom ventilation solutions for demanding industrial environments.
companyterms.youAlwaysResponsible: You always know who is responsible for your order.
companyterms.deliveryAdress: EXW Black Icon Srl — Via Santa Maria, 84, 36030 Sarcedo (VI), Italy.

homepage.bestSelEvery: Every model of fans can be made in stainless steel
homepage.bestReviewsLeft: We ordered ventilation systems for our paint booth. The equipment operates quietly, efficiently, and without interruptions. Delivery was fast, and the team helped us choose the right model. Very satisfied with the cooperation.
homepage.bestTextRight: We purchased HARIA industrial fans for our company. The quality is excellent — you can immediately see the European manufacturing standards. We especially appreciated the ability to customize the units to our needs. Highly recommended.

footernav.totaltextForm: Our customers share their impressions of the quality of our  service. We are grateful for every review — it helps us become even better.

aboutus.carttextUsTop: Black Icon Srl is a young company, but its founders have twenty years of experience in the industrial sector. Located in the heart of the Veneto region, the company has grown as a trusted partner to the artisanal and industrial sectors.
aboutus.carttextUsSecond: leveraging automation, development, and engineering of drying, ventilation, and air conditioning systems. It then expanded to its own production of key components, such as industrial fans.
aboutus.carttextUsMidle: After an in-depth analysis, the company identified the main obstacles users faced, such as delivery times for certain models, and, even more importantly, the creation of special machines, such as models made of stainless steel or with customized architectures, while maintaining affordable costs and delivering on average.
aboutus.carttextUsBotton: Our production of the HARIA series and our collaboration with leading companies in the sector make Black Icon Srl a flexible and reliable company, focused on service and customization.
